title: festuca rivularis var. sennenii
intro: Festuca rivularis var. sennenii, also known as Sennen's fescue, is a variety of the Festuca rivularis grass species, which is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Spain and Portugal. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Festuca rivularis var. sennenii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
